mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) AS gmv, NVL(SUM(o.COUPON_DISCOUNT), 0) AS couponDiscount, NVL(SUM(o.POINT_DISCOUNT), 0) AS pointUsed, NVL(SUM(ROUND(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)), 0) AS commission, NVL(SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT - ROUND(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)), 0) AS partnerPayout, NVL(SUM(ROUND(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)) - SUM(o.COUPON_DISCOUNT) - SUM(o.POINT_DISCOUNT), 0) AS netProfit, CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(ROUND(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)) / SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT) * 100, 1) END AS commissionRate FROM ORDERS o INNER JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID INNER JOIN RESERVATION r ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID WHERE o.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{year})
AND TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'MM') = #{month}

SELECT NVL(SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) FROM ORDERS o INNER JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID INNER JOIN RESERVATION r ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID WHERE o.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(#{year}) || '-' || #{month}, 'YYYY-MM'), -1), 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'MM/DD') AS day, NVL(SUM(ROUND(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)), 0) AS commission, NVL(SUM(ROUND(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)) - SUM(o.COUPON_DISCOUNT) - SUM(o.POINT_DISCOUNT), 0) AS netProfit FROM ORDERS o INNER JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID INNER JOIN RESERVATION r ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID WHERE o.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{year}) AND TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'MM') = #{month} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(o.ORDER_DATE) ORDER BY TRUNC(o.ORDER_DATE) ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.PARTNER_ID) FROM RESERVATION r WHERE r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT NVL(SUM(r.AMOUNT - ROUND(r.AMOUNT * r.COMMISSION_RATE / 100)), 0) FROM RESERVATION r WHERE r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
